summary: Tested Delete Questionnaire feature end-to-end. All backend and frontend tests passed. Feature is fully functional.
seed_data_creation: Created user testdelete_iq@example.com / Test1234! for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delete Questionnaire feature is fully working. Backend DELETE /api/questionnaires/{id} returns 200 {success:true} on success, 404 for missing ID, 400 for invalid ID format. Frontend three-dot menu, dropdown, confirm dialog, cancel, delete, and success toast all work correctly. Stats counter updates after deletion.

backend: DELETE returns 400 for invalid ID format
Deleted questionnaire no longer appears in list
frontend: Three-dot menu button (MoreVertical icon) present with correct data-testid
Clicking menu shows dropdown with Delete option
Clicking Cancel closes dialog without deleting
Item remains in list after Cancel
Clicking Delete confirm removes item from list and shows 'Questionnaire deleted' toast
